items.title: OpenAI's massive Stargate data center canceled as firm can't reach terms with Oracle, operator struggles with reliability issues — Meta said to be interested in snatching excess capacity
items.description: Financing terms and swinging OpenAI capacity forecast collapse a major expansion of a Stargate data center. Yet, Meta could take the yet-to-be-expanded space.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Oracle and OpenAI have cancelled plans to expand their flagship AI data center campus in Abilene, Texas, after lengthy negotiations broke down over financing arrangements and OpenAI's changing capacity projections, reports Bloomberg. The Abilene campus is part of the Stargate project announced at the White House last year, and yet, it seems like it faces slowdowns. Just like other Oracle's data centers meant for OpenAI. Yet, Meta could take the yet-to-be-expanded space.Go deeper with TH Premium: AI and data centers (Image credit: Microsoft)Photonics and high-speed data movement is the next big AI bottleneckThe data center cooling state of playMassive AI data center buildouts are squeezing energy suppliesUltra Ethernet: The data center interconnection of tomorrowSince mid-2025, Oracle, Crusoe, and OpenAI have discussed increasing data center power capacity from about 1.2 GW to roughly 2.0 GW, amid reluctance from locals. Negotiations got complicated due to difficult financing terms and OpenAI’s shifting capacity forecasts, which led to their collapse, according to Bloomberg. Nonetheless, development of the 1,000-acre campus remains underway, and multiple facilities are already in service, though preliminary agreements to rent a substantial expansion were ultimately dropped. Could it be a signal that the Stargate project fails while the whole AI industry is on the rise?The Abilene campus remains one of the biggest AI data center projects announced so far, yet to date, it has been known primarily as a part of the widely publicized Stargate project. Oracle has been rapidly installing Nvidia-based servers used by OpenAI to train and deploy AI models and systems. However, relations between Oracle and Crusoe have been strained by reliability issues. Earlier this year, winter weather disrupted parts of the liquid-cooling infrastructure, forcing several buildings offline for multiple days. Both companies say cooperation remains strong and development continues swiftly, yet the source report clearly notes hiccups. You may like Stargate AI data centers for OpenAI reportedly delayed by squabbles between partners Oracle reportedly delays several new OpenAI data centers because of shortages OpenAI couldn’t finance its data centers, so it took control of the hardware instead Given the rising tensions between the Stargate partners, Crusoe began searching for another tenant, according to Bloomberg. At that point, Nvidia reportedly stepped in to help ensure the site would continue deploying its hardware rather than systems powered by AMD. Furthermore, Nvidia provided Crusoe with a $150 million deposit and assisted efforts to attract Meta — which is not a part of the Stargate project — as a prospective tenant for the additional capacity, the report says. Meanwhile, Meta has yet to confirm its expansion at the Abilene campus.Despite shelving the expansion of one Stargate project, Oracle's general partnership with OpenAI remains unchanged. In July last year, Oracle agreed to develop 4.5 GW of data center capacity for OpenAI, and that program continues. The companies have also announced projects in other locations, including a site near Detroit owned by Related Digital.*One gigawatt is comparable to the output of a nuclear reactor and can supply electricity to hundreds of thousands of homes at peak usage. That being said, a nuclear power plant was not reported to be a part of negotiations, which perhaps explains why locals were against increasing power capacity using things like coal or gas generators, yet we are speculating here. items.author: Anton Shilov
items.titleZh: OpenAI大规模星门数据中心计划告吹，与甲骨文未达协议且运营商可靠性堪忧——Meta据称有意接手剩余容量
items.descriptionZh:
根据彭博社报道，甲骨文（Oracle）与OpenAI已取消在德克萨斯州阿比林市扩展其旗舰人工智能数据中心园区的计划。此次合作破裂源于漫长的融资谈判未能达成一致，以及OpenAI不断变化的算力需求预测。该园区是去年在白宫宣布的“星门”（Stargate）项目的一部分，此次扩建搁置可能预示着这一备受瞩目的超大规模AI基础设施项目面临延迟。

**项目背景与现状**
阿比林园区是迄今为止已公布的最大AI数据中心项目之一，占地1000英亩，目前已有多个设施投入运营。甲骨文一直在该园区快速部署基于英伟达（NVIDIA）硬件的服务器，供OpenAI用于训练和部署AI模型。自2025年中以来，双方曾与合作伙伴Crusoe能源公司商讨，计划将园区的电力容量从约1.2吉瓦（GW）提升至约2.0吉瓦。1吉瓦的电力相当于一座核反应堆的输出，足以满足数十万家庭的高峰用电需求。然而，该计划遭到当地居民的反对，部分原因可能在于新增电力若依赖化石燃料将引发环境担忧。

**谈判破裂的核心原因**
谈判陷入僵局主要源于两点：一是融资条件复杂苛刻；二是OpenAI自身对未来算力需求的预测频繁变动，导致项目规模和投资的不确定性增加。最终，关于租赁大量扩建空间的初步协议被放弃。

**潜在替代方案与行业动态**
在“星门”项目合作伙伴关系紧张之际，Crusoe开始寻找其他租户。据报道，英伟达介入此事，为确保该站点继续部署其硬件（而非AMD系统）提供了支持。英伟达向Crusoe支付了1.5亿美元定金，并协助吸引Meta作为新增容量的潜在租户。Meta并非“星门”项目成员，且目前尚未确认其在阿比林园区的扩张计划。若Meta接手，这将意味着该空间用途的显著转变。

**技术挑战与合作伙伴关系**
该项目此前已遭遇运营挑战。今年早些时候，冬季天气曾导致部分液冷基础设施中断，迫使多栋建筑离线数天。尽管甲骨文与Crusoe均表示合作依然稳固且开发迅速，但上述事件与此次扩建取消，均暴露了建设如此庞大、复杂的AI基础设施所面临的现实困难。

**更广泛的合作前景**
尽管阿比林扩建计划搁浅，但甲骨文与OpenAI的总体合作伙伴关系并未改变。去年7月，甲骨文同意为OpenAI开发总计4.5吉瓦的数据中心容量，该计划仍在继续。双方也宣布了在其他地点的项目，例如在底特律附近由Related Digital拥有的场地。

**行业影响与未来展望**
此次事件凸显了在AI竞赛白热化背景下，超大规模数据中心建设所面临的巨大挑战：**巨额资本支出、复杂的供应链与合作伙伴协调、波动的需求预测、严峻的能源供应与冷却压力，以及社区接受度问题**。这不仅是单个项目的挫折，也是整个行业在急速扩张中必须应对的缩影。未来，AI基础设施的发展能否与可持续能源、稳定运营和商业可行性达成平衡，将是决定其长期成败的关键。

items.title: Palmer Luckey’s retro gaming venture seeks $1 billion valuation as FPGA-based Nintendo 64 clone launch nears — ModRetro's M64 console plays original N64 cartridges, supports 4K resolution
items.description: Palmer Luckey is said to be in talks with investors to raise funds for ModRetro at a $1 billion valuation as the retro gaming company prepares to ship its second product.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Palmer Luckey is said to be in talks with investors to raise funds for ModRetro at a $1 billion valuation, according to the Financial Times. The news comes as the retro gaming company prepares to ship its second product, an FPGA-based Nintendo 64 clone called the M64.Tom's Hardware Premium Roadmaps (Image credit: Future)High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) Roadmap Nvidia Enterprise GPU and CPU RoadmapAI accelerator RoadmapDesktop GPU Roadmap3D NAND RoadmapLuckey, who co-founded defense contractor Anduril Industries and previously sold virtual reality headset company Oculus to Facebook for $2 billion in 2014, has been building ModRetro since 2023 as a side venture. The company launched its first device, the Chromatic, in 2024, which is a Game Boy-compatible handheld that drew strong reviews and sold through GameStop. The M64 is a considerably larger project, both in product scope and financial ambition, however.According to the FT, which cited people familiar with the matter, ModRetro is in early discussions about backing the business ahead of devices including the M64. The company has previously raised around $19 million, per PitchBook data, making a $1 billion ask a significant step up in scale. You may like Nintendo's Game & Watch hacked and turned into retro emulation beast Atari ST enthusiast announces the MiniST with FPGA, MiSTeryNano core, and black TKL case Ayaneo Next 2 Windows handheld goes official with Ryzen AI Max+ 395 The M64 is an Open FPGA-based console designed to play original N64 cartridges, outputting at 4K over HDMI. Unlike traditional software emulators, FPGA implementations replicate the original hardware's chip logic directly, which generally results in higher accuracy and lower latency.ModRetro has confirmed the M64 uses an AMD FPGA chip running a modified version of the open-source MiSTer N64 core, well and truly setting it apart from the Analogue 3D, its primary competitor, which uses a proprietary closed-software implementation. Luckey has also said the M64 will be more open to third-party cores than Analogue's platform.The M64’s “early bird pricing” is $199, matching the Nintendo 64's original U.S. launch price from 1996, and a waitlist is open at modretro.com. No firm release date has been set, though it’s understood that mass production is underway with a spring 2026 launch window expected. The console will initially come in three translucent colors — Arctic White, Jungle Green, and Grape Purple — with a fourth red variant added based on community feedback. Each comes with a recreation of the N64's distinctive three-pronged controller, a contrast to the Analogue 3D's controversial partnership with 8BitDo, which produced a more modern gamepad design.The Analogue 3D, which began shipping in late 2025, recently raised its price from $250 to $270, citing tariffs, giving ModRetro a $70 price advantage going into its launch window. Analogue's console is currently sold out. ModRetro did not respond to requests for comment, the FT reported.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsFollow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Luke James
items.titleZh: 帕尔默·拉奇的复古游戏公司估值将达10亿美元，基于FPGA芯片的任天堂64复刻主机即将上市——ModRetro推出的M64主机支持原版卡带与4K分辨率。
items.descriptionZh:
知名复古游戏硬件公司ModRetro，由其创始人、前Oculus和现国防承包商Anduril Industries联合创始人帕尔默·拉基（Palmer Luckey）于2023年创立，目前正寻求以高达10亿美元的估值进行新一轮融资。此轮融资旨在支持公司业务，特别是为其即将推出的旗舰产品——基于FPGA技术的任天堂N64克隆游戏机M64提供资金。此前，该公司已通过其首款产品、广受好评且通过GameStop销售的Game Boy兼容掌机Chromatic证明了市场能力，并已融资约1900万美元。

M64项目的核心技术创新在于其采用的FPGA（现场可编程门阵列）方案。与传统软件模拟器不同，FPGA通过直接复制原始游戏机（如N64）芯片的硬件逻辑电路来实现游戏运行，这带来了近乎原生的高精度模拟和极低的输入延迟，从而在画面准确性和操作响应上远超软件模拟。ModRetro已确认，M64将搭载一颗AMD的FPGA芯片，并运行经过修改的开源MiSTer项目N64核心。这一“开放FPGA”策略是其与主要竞争对手Analogue 3D（采用封闭的专有软件实现）最显著的区别。拉基强调，M64平台将对第三方核心开发更加开放，这有望吸引开发者社区并扩展其游戏兼容性。

在性能与参数上，M64设计为可直接插入原始N64卡带，并通过HDMI输出高达4K分辨率的画面。其“早鸟定价”为199美元，不仅与1996年N64在美国的原始发售价持平，也相较于其主要竞争对手Analogue 3D（近期因关税将售价从250美元上调至270美元）具有明显的价格优势。M64计划于2026年春季上市，目前正在进行量产。初期将提供北极白、丛林绿和葡萄紫三种透明配色，并会根据社区反馈增加第四种红色版本。产品标配一个复刻了N64经典三叉戟手柄造型的控制器，这与Analogue 3D选择与8BitDo合作生产现代化手柄的设计思路形成鲜明对比。

从技术影响和应用场景来看，M64代表了复古游戏硬件市场的一个新趋势：即利用开放、高性能的FPGA硬件，为硬核复古游戏玩家和收藏家提供最原汁原味且画质增强的游戏体验。其开源核心策略可能推动一个更活跃的社区开发生态，而亲民的价格和经典设计则直接瞄准了主流怀旧玩家市场。目前Analogue 3D处于售罄状态，为M64留下了明确的市场窗口。如果ModRetro能成功融资并如期交付产品，凭借其技术路线、价格策略和开放性优势，M64有望在高端复古游戏主机领域成为强有力的竞争者，甚至重塑该细分市场的格局。

items.title: Chinese SSD maker YMTC lists first commercial PCIe 5.0 SSD as worldwide shortage intensifies — Xtacking 4.0 NAND powers speeds of up to 10,500 MB/s
items.description: The newly listed PC550 SSD targets AI PCs and commercial systems and features PCIe 5.0 x4 connectivity, NVMe 2.0 support, and a four-channel design.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Chinese manufacturer Yangtze Memory Technologies Corp (YMTC) has just listed its first commercial PCIe 5.0 NVMe SSD. The PC550 SSD features a PCIe 5.0 x4 interface along with the NVMe 2.0 protocol, and is being offered in 512GB, 1TB, and 2TB capacities. The SSD features YMTC’s X4-9070 3D NAND chips based on Xtacking 4.0, along with a four-channel design, which is claimed to help in reducing power consumption and heat generation when compared to eight-channel.Go deeper with TH Premium: AI shortages (Image credit: Nvidia)AI data centers are swallowing the world's memory and storage supplyChip scarcity assaults auto industry amid the worsening Nexperia and DRAM crisisSamsung and SK hynix shorten memory contracts as pricing power shifts back to suppliersMemory makers are set to earn $551 billion from the AI boomThe YMTC PC550 SSD will be available in both M.2 2242 and M.2 2280 form factors and is primarily targeted at AI PCs and commercial client systems. According to the company, the drive can offer up to 10,500 MB/s sequential read and up to 10,000 MB/s sequential write on the 2TB variant. While that makes it considerably faster than some of the best PCIe 4.0 SSDs, it isn’t the fastest among PCIe 5.0 drives, as other manufacturers offer products capable of reaching speeds close to 15,000 MB/s.Back in late 2024, we spotted a PCIe 5.0 SSD based on YMTC’s NAND delivering much higher speeds. The Zhitai TiPro9000, which used YMTC’s 5th-generation 3D NAND with the Xtacking 4.0 architecture, was tested with the Silicon Motion SM2508 controller and achieved sequential read speeds of 14,527 MB/s and write speeds of roughly 13,800 MB/s. You may like Micron announces 3610 SSD, the industry-first PCIe 5.0 QLC SSD available to OEMs First PCIe 6.0 SSD enters mass production with 28GB/s speeds, 5.5 million IOPS, and liquid cooling Phison's new SSD controller sips a mere 2.3W and runs at 14.7 GB/s, addressing PCIe 5.0's power concerns Coming back to the PC550, the 512GB base model is listed to offer up to 880K random read IOPS and 1,100K random write IOPS, along with a durability rating of 300TBW. Both the 1TB and 2TB models offer increased performance of 1,300K random read and write IOPS with an endurance of 600 TBW and 1,200 TBW respectively. As for power consumption, the drive is claimed to consume less than 3mW at idle and under 6W during active workloads.The official product page of the YMTC PC550 SSD does not mention price or a way to purchase the drive, however, consumers interested in the product can drop an inquiry. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
items.author: Kunal Khullar
items.titleZh: 长江存储推出全球首款商用PCIe 5.0 SSD，Xtacking 4.0闪存实现10500 MB/s极速——全球供应紧缺加剧之际
items.descriptionZh:
中国存储制造商长江存储技术公司近日正式发布了其首款商用PCIe 5.0 NVMe固态硬盘——PC550。该产品标志着长江存储在高性能消费级存储领域迈出了重要一步，也是国内产业链在PCIe 5.0这一前沿接口标准上的关键进展。

**背景与产品定位**
PC550 SSD提供了512GB、1TB和2TB三种容量选项，采用M.2 2242和M.2 2280两种规格。其发布正值AI PC与高性能商用客户端系统需求崛起之际，产品明确瞄准了这一市场，旨在为AI计算、内容创作和专业应用提供高速存储支持。

**核心技术原理与创新点**
该固态硬盘的核心技术亮点主要体现在两方面：
1.  **Xtacking 4.0架构与X4-9070 3D NAND闪存**：PC550采用了长江存储自研的X4-9070 3D NAND芯片，基于最新的Xtacking 4.0架构。该架构通过将存储单元阵列和外围电路分别在两片晶圆上独立制造并垂直堆叠互连，提升了存储密度和I/O速度，同时优化了生产周期。
2.  **四通道设计**：与市场上许多高性能PCIe 5.0 SSD采用的八通道设计不同，PC550选择了四通道设计。长江存储声称，这一设计有助于在保持高性能的同时，有效降低功耗和减少发热，从而改善能效比，对于空间紧凑、散热要求高的设备（如轻薄AI PC）更具实际意义。

**性能参数与对比分析**
根据官方数据，PC550 2TB型号的顺序读取和写入速度最高分别可达10,500 MB/s和10,000 MB/s。这一性能使其显著超越了市面上顶级的PCIe 4.0 SSD，但与部分竞品的PCIe 5.0旗舰型号（速度可达约15,000 MB/s）相比，仍有一定差距。新闻中提及，早在2024年底，已有采用长江存储第五代3D NAND（Xtacking 4.0）和慧荣SM2508主控的固态硬盘（如致态TiPro9000）在测试中实现了超过14,500 MB/s的顺序读取速度，表明长江存储闪存在更高性能配置下具备潜力。

在随机性能方面，512GB型号的随机读写IOPS分别为88万和110万，而1TB和2TB型号则均提升至130万/130万 IOPS。耐用性（TBW）方面，三个容量依次为300TB、600TB和1200TB。功耗控制是PC550强调的另一个优势，其空闲功耗宣称低于3mW，活跃工作负载下的功耗也控制在6W以下。

**技术影响与应用场景**
长江存储PC550的推出，为AI PC和高端商用笔记本市场提供了一个新的高性能存储选择。其平衡性能与功耗的设计思路，特别适合对续航、散热和性能有综合要求的移动计算平台。此外，作为中国核心存储厂商在PCIe 5.0领域的重要产品，PC550的上市也增强了存储供应链的多样性，特别是在当前AI数据中心需求激增、全球存储供应面临压力的背景下。

目前，该产品的官方页面尚未公布具体售价和购买方式，消费者需通过询价渠道获取进一步信息。

items.title: Seagate FireCuda X1070 SSD spotted at retailers — listed at $829.99 before any official announcement
items.description: Seagate's unannounced FireCuda X1070 NVMe SSD appeared on Amazon and Best Buy listings this week before its product page went offline.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Seagate's unannounced FireCuda X1070 NVMe SSD appeared on Amazon and Best Buy listings this week — with a full spec sheet from Best Buy and an indicated price of $829.99 — before its product page went offline, suggesting an announcement could be imminent. The drive is a PCIe Gen4x4 M.2 2280 model coming in 1TB, 2TB, and 4TB capacities, and marks Seagate's first new consumer SSD in more than a year. (Image credit: Future)Sequential read speed is rated at 7,200 MB/s across all three capacities, and sequential write reaches 6,000 MB/s on the 1TB model and 6,500 MB/s on the 2TB and 4TB variants. Random performance is listed at up to 900,000 IOPS read and 1,000,000 IOPS write, depending on capacity. Seagate is bundling a 5-year warranty and three years of its Rescue Data Recovery Services across the lineup.The X1070 trails on several key specs compared to the current FireCuda 530R. Sequential read and write speeds are lower across all three capacities, and the 530R's 4TB model is rated for 5,100 TBW versus the X1070's 2,400 TBW. You may like First PCIe 6.0 SSD enters mass production with 28GB/s speeds, 5.5 million IOPS, and liquid cooling Micro Center lists 8TB WD_Black SSD at $2,419 MSRP, real price tag up 50% since October Micron announces 3610 SSD, the industry-first PCIe 5.0 QLC SSD available to OEMs Swipe to scroll horizontallyRow 0 - Cell 0 X1070 1TBX1070 2TBX1070 4TB530R 1TB530R 4TBInterfacePCIe 4.0 x4PCIe 4.0 x4PCIe 4.0 x4PCIe 4.0 x4PCIe 4.0 x4Seq. Read (MB/s)7,2007,2007,2007,4007,400Seq. Write (MB/s)6,0006,5006,5007,0006,900Rand. Read (IOPS)850,000900,000900,000——Rand. Write (IOPS)900,0001,000,000900,000——Durability Rating (TBW)6001,2002,4001,2755,100NANDTBCTBCTBC3D TLC3D TLCThat difference may come down to NAND type. Amazon's listing described the X1070 as using "3D QLC NAND," though the performance figures sit closer to what TLC-based drives typically deliver. QLC SSDs tend to drop off more sharply under sustained sequential writes once the SLC write cache is exhausted, which would also account for the lower TBW ratings. Neither the controller nor the NAND has been confirmed by Seagate, so both remain unknown until an official announcement.The drive is certified for the ROG Xbox Ally, and ROG Xbox Ally X handhelds, and the retail box includes a one-month Xbox Game Pass Ultimate trial and a two-month Adobe Creative Cloud Pro subscription per the Best Buy spec sheet.The decision to go with PCIe Gen4 rather than Gen5 is notable given that the FireCuda 540 uses a Gen5 interface. PCIe 5.0 SSDs remain expensive and run hot, so Gen4 makes sense given its apparent target applications, even if the X1070 appears to slot below the 530R on paper rather than above it. Seagate released no new consumer storage products in 2025, making the X1070 its first release in the client SSD market in over a year.At this stage, no official information or launch date has been announced, and whether that $829 price tag is accurate remains unknown.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Luke James
items.titleZh: 希捷FireCuda X1070 SSD现身零售渠道——未官宣先曝光，标价829.99美元
items.descriptionZh:
希捷尚未正式发布的FireCuda X1070 NVMe固态硬盘，其产品页面和规格于本周意外出现在亚马逊和百思买等零售平台，随后被撤下，这表明其官方发布可能已临近。泄露信息显示，这款固态硬盘定价为829.99美元，是希捷一年多来首次推出的新款消费级SSD。

该硬盘采用PCIe Gen4 x4接口和M.2 2280外形规格，提供1TB、2TB和4TB三种容量。其连续读取速度在三种容量下均为7,200 MB/s，而连续写入速度在1TB型号上为6,000 MB/s，在2TB和4TB型号上则达到6,500 MB/s。随机性能方面，最高可达900,000 IOPS读取和1,000,000 IOPS写入（具体数值依容量而定）。全系列产品均附带5年质保和3年的Rescue数据恢复服务。

与当前产品线中的FireCuda 530R相比，X1070在多个关键规格上有所“落后”。其连续读写速度在所有容量上都低于530R。尤其在耐用性指标（TBW，总写入字节数）上，差异显著：530R的4TB型号额定为5,100 TBW，而X1070的4TB型号仅为2,400 TBW。这种差异很可能源于闪存类型的不同。亚马逊的列表描述X1070使用的是“3D QLC NAND”，尽管其性能数据更接近通常基于TLC的硬盘。QLC固态硬盘的特性是，一旦SLC写入缓存耗尽，其在持续顺序写入下的性能会显著下降，这也解释了其较低的TBW评级。目前，希捷尚未正式确认其控制器和闪存的具体型号。

值得注意的是，X1070选择了PCIe Gen4接口，而非其兄弟型号FireCuda 540所采用的Gen5接口。考虑到目前PCIe 5.0 SSD价格仍然昂贵且发热量较大，Gen4接口对于其目标应用场景（包括经过认证的ROG Ally和Ally X游戏掌机）来说是更合理的选择。从纸面规格看，X1070似乎并非用于取代或定位高于530R，而是可能面向不同的细分市场。

此外，根据百思买的规格表，其零售包装将包含一个月的Xbox Game Pass Ultimate试用版和两个月的Adobe Creative Cloud Pro订阅服务。

目前，希捷尚未发布任何官方信息或发布日期，829.99美元的价格标签是否准确也尚不确定。此次X1070的泄露，标志着希捷在2025年未推出任何新消费级存储产品后，重新回归客户端SSD市场。

history.title: OpenAI's massive Stargate data center canceled as firm can't reach terms with Oracle, operator struggles with reliability issues — Meta said to be interested in snatching excess capacity
history.description: Financing terms and swinging OpenAI capacity forecast collapse a major expansion of a Stargate data center. Yet, Meta could take the yet-to-be-expanded space.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Oracle and OpenAI have cancelled plans to expand their flagship AI data center campus in Abilene, Texas, after lengthy negotiations broke down over financing arrangements and OpenAI's changing capacity projections, reports Bloomberg. The Abilene campus is part of the Stargate project announced at the White House last year, and yet, it seems like it faces slowdowns. Just like other Oracle's data centers meant for OpenAI. Yet, Meta could take the yet-to-be-expanded space.Go deeper with TH Premium: AI and data centers (Image credit: Microsoft)Photonics and high-speed data movement is the next big AI bottleneckThe data center cooling state of playMassive AI data center buildouts are squeezing energy suppliesUltra Ethernet: The data center interconnection of tomorrowSince mid-2025, Oracle, Crusoe, and OpenAI have discussed increasing data center power capacity from about 1.2 GW to roughly 2.0 GW, amid reluctance from locals. Negotiations got complicated due to difficult financing terms and OpenAI’s shifting capacity forecasts, which led to their collapse, according to Bloomberg. Nonetheless, development of the 1,000-acre campus remains underway, and multiple facilities are already in service, though preliminary agreements to rent a substantial expansion were ultimately dropped. Could it be a signal that the Stargate project fails while the whole AI industry is on the rise?The Abilene campus remains one of the biggest AI data center projects announced so far, yet to date, it has been known primarily as a part of the widely publicized Stargate project. Oracle has been rapidly installing Nvidia-based servers used by OpenAI to train and deploy AI models and systems. However, relations between Oracle and Crusoe have been strained by reliability issues. Earlier this year, winter weather disrupted parts of the liquid-cooling infrastructure, forcing several buildings offline for multiple days. Both companies say cooperation remains strong and development continues swiftly, yet the source report clearly notes hiccups. You may like Stargate AI data centers for OpenAI reportedly delayed by squabbles between partners Oracle reportedly delays several new OpenAI data centers because of shortages OpenAI couldn’t finance its data centers, so it took control of the hardware instead Given the rising tensions between the Stargate partners, Crusoe began searching for another tenant, according to Bloomberg. At that point, Nvidia reportedly stepped in to help ensure the site would continue deploying its hardware rather than systems powered by AMD. Furthermore, Nvidia provided Crusoe with a $150 million deposit and assisted efforts to attract Meta — which is not a part of the Stargate project — as a prospective tenant for the additional capacity, the report says. Meanwhile, Meta has yet to confirm its expansion at the Abilene campus.Despite shelving the expansion of one Stargate project, Oracle's general partnership with OpenAI remains unchanged. In July last year, Oracle agreed to develop 4.5 GW of data center capacity for OpenAI, and that program continues. The companies have also announced projects in other locations, including a site near Detroit owned by Related Digital.*One gigawatt is comparable to the output of a nuclear reactor and can supply electricity to hundreds of thousands of homes at peak usage. That being said, a nuclear power plant was not reported to be a part of negotiations, which perhaps explains why locals were against increasing power capacity using things like coal or gas generators, yet we are speculating here. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
history.author: Anton Shilov
history.titleZh: OpenAI大规模星门数据中心计划告吹，与甲骨文未达协议且运营商可靠性堪忧——Meta据称有意接手剩余容量
history.descriptionZh:
根据彭博社报道，甲骨文（Oracle）与OpenAI已取消在德克萨斯州阿比林市扩展其旗舰人工智能数据中心园区的计划。此次合作破裂源于漫长的融资谈判未能达成一致，以及OpenAI不断变化的算力需求预测。该园区是去年在白宫宣布的“星门”（Stargate）项目的一部分，此次扩建搁置可能预示着这一备受瞩目的超大规模AI基础设施项目面临延迟。

**项目背景与现状**
阿比林园区是迄今为止已公布的最大AI数据中心项目之一，占地1000英亩，目前已有多个设施投入运营。甲骨文一直在该园区快速部署基于英伟达（NVIDIA）硬件的服务器，供OpenAI用于训练和部署AI模型。自2025年中以来，双方曾与合作伙伴Crusoe能源公司商讨，计划将园区的电力容量从约1.2吉瓦（GW）提升至约2.0吉瓦。1吉瓦的电力相当于一座核反应堆的输出，足以满足数十万家庭的高峰用电需求。然而，该计划遭到当地居民的反对，部分原因可能在于新增电力若依赖化石燃料将引发环境担忧。

**谈判破裂的核心原因**
谈判陷入僵局主要源于两点：一是融资条件复杂苛刻；二是OpenAI自身对未来算力需求的预测频繁变动，导致项目规模和投资的不确定性增加。最终，关于租赁大量扩建空间的初步协议被放弃。

**潜在替代方案与行业动态**
在“星门”项目合作伙伴关系紧张之际，Crusoe开始寻找其他租户。据报道，英伟达介入此事，为确保该站点继续部署其硬件（而非AMD系统）提供了支持。英伟达向Crusoe支付了1.5亿美元定金，并协助吸引Meta作为新增容量的潜在租户。Meta并非“星门”项目成员，且目前尚未确认其在阿比林园区的扩张计划。若Meta接手，这将意味着该空间用途的显著转变。

**技术挑战与合作伙伴关系**
该项目此前已遭遇运营挑战。今年早些时候，冬季天气曾导致部分液冷基础设施中断，迫使多栋建筑离线数天。尽管甲骨文与Crusoe均表示合作依然稳固且开发迅速，但上述事件与此次扩建取消，均暴露了建设如此庞大、复杂的AI基础设施所面临的现实困难。

**更广泛的合作前景**
尽管阿比林扩建计划搁浅，但甲骨文与OpenAI的总体合作伙伴关系并未改变。去年7月，甲骨文同意为OpenAI开发总计4.5吉瓦的数据中心容量，该计划仍在继续。双方也宣布了在其他地点的项目，例如在底特律附近由Related Digital拥有的场地。

**行业影响与未来展望**
此次事件凸显了在AI竞赛白热化背景下，超大规模数据中心建设所面临的巨大挑战：**巨额资本支出、复杂的供应链与合作伙伴协调、波动的需求预测、严峻的能源供应与冷却压力，以及社区接受度问题**。这不仅是单个项目的挫折，也是整个行业在急速扩张中必须应对的缩影。未来，AI基础设施的发展能否与可持续能源、稳定运营和商业可行性达成平衡，将是决定其长期成败的关键。

history.title: Palmer Luckey’s retro gaming venture seeks $1 billion valuation as FPGA-based Nintendo 64 clone launch nears — ModRetro's M64 console plays original N64 cartridges, supports 4K resolution
history.description: Palmer Luckey is said to be in talks with investors to raise funds for ModRetro at a $1 billion valuation as the retro gaming company prepares to ship its second product.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Palmer Luckey is said to be in talks with investors to raise funds for ModRetro at a $1 billion valuation, according to the Financial Times. The news comes as the retro gaming company prepares to ship its second product, an FPGA-based Nintendo 64 clone called the M64.Tom's Hardware Premium Roadmaps (Image credit: Future)High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) Roadmap Nvidia Enterprise GPU and CPU RoadmapAI accelerator RoadmapDesktop GPU Roadmap3D NAND RoadmapLuckey, who co-founded defense contractor Anduril Industries and previously sold virtual reality headset company Oculus to Facebook for $2 billion in 2014, has been building ModRetro since 2023 as a side venture. The company launched its first device, the Chromatic, in 2024, which is a Game Boy-compatible handheld that drew strong reviews and sold through GameStop. The M64 is a considerably larger project, both in product scope and financial ambition, however.According to the FT, which cited people familiar with the matter, ModRetro is in early discussions about backing the business ahead of devices including the M64. The company has previously raised around $19 million, per PitchBook data, making a $1 billion ask a significant step up in scale. You may like Nintendo's Game & Watch hacked and turned into retro emulation beast Atari ST enthusiast announces the MiniST with FPGA, MiSTeryNano core, and black TKL case Ayaneo Next 2 Windows handheld goes official with Ryzen AI Max+ 395 The M64 is an Open FPGA-based console designed to play original N64 cartridges, outputting at 4K over HDMI. Unlike traditional software emulators, FPGA implementations replicate the original hardware's chip logic directly, which generally results in higher accuracy and lower latency.ModRetro has confirmed the M64 uses an AMD FPGA chip running a modified version of the open-source MiSTer N64 core, well and truly setting it apart from the Analogue 3D, its primary competitor, which uses a proprietary closed-software implementation. Luckey has also said the M64 will be more open to third-party cores than Analogue's platform.The M64’s “early bird pricing” is $199, matching the Nintendo 64's original U.S. launch price from 1996, and a waitlist is open at modretro.com. No firm release date has been set, though it’s understood that mass production is underway with a spring 2026 launch window expected. The console will initially come in three translucent colors — Arctic White, Jungle Green, and Grape Purple — with a fourth red variant added based on community feedback. Each comes with a recreation of the N64's distinctive three-pronged controller, a contrast to the Analogue 3D's controversial partnership with 8BitDo, which produced a more modern gamepad design.The Analogue 3D, which began shipping in late 2025, recently raised its price from $250 to $270, citing tariffs, giving ModRetro a $70 price advantage going into its launch window. Analogue's console is currently sold out. ModRetro did not respond to requests for comment, the FT reported.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsFollow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
history.author: Luke James
history.titleZh: 帕尔默·拉奇的复古游戏公司估值将达10亿美元，基于FPGA芯片的任天堂64复刻主机即将上市——ModRetro推出的M64主机支持原版卡带与4K分辨率。
history.descriptionZh:
知名复古游戏硬件公司ModRetro，由其创始人、前Oculus和现国防承包商Anduril Industries联合创始人帕尔默·拉基（Palmer Luckey）于2023年创立，目前正寻求以高达10亿美元的估值进行新一轮融资。此轮融资旨在支持公司业务，特别是为其即将推出的旗舰产品——基于FPGA技术的任天堂N64克隆游戏机M64提供资金。此前，该公司已通过其首款产品、广受好评且通过GameStop销售的Game Boy兼容掌机Chromatic证明了市场能力，并已融资约1900万美元。

M64项目的核心技术创新在于其采用的FPGA（现场可编程门阵列）方案。与传统软件模拟器不同，FPGA通过直接复制原始游戏机（如N64）芯片的硬件逻辑电路来实现游戏运行，这带来了近乎原生的高精度模拟和极低的输入延迟，从而在画面准确性和操作响应上远超软件模拟。ModRetro已确认，M64将搭载一颗AMD的FPGA芯片，并运行经过修改的开源MiSTer项目N64核心。这一“开放FPGA”策略是其与主要竞争对手Analogue 3D（采用封闭的专有软件实现）最显著的区别。拉基强调，M64平台将对第三方核心开发更加开放，这有望吸引开发者社区并扩展其游戏兼容性。

在性能与参数上，M64设计为可直接插入原始N64卡带，并通过HDMI输出高达4K分辨率的画面。其“早鸟定价”为199美元，不仅与1996年N64在美国的原始发售价持平，也相较于其主要竞争对手Analogue 3D（近期因关税将售价从250美元上调至270美元）具有明显的价格优势。M64计划于2026年春季上市，目前正在进行量产。初期将提供北极白、丛林绿和葡萄紫三种透明配色，并会根据社区反馈增加第四种红色版本。产品标配一个复刻了N64经典三叉戟手柄造型的控制器，这与Analogue 3D选择与8BitDo合作生产现代化手柄的设计思路形成鲜明对比。

从技术影响和应用场景来看，M64代表了复古游戏硬件市场的一个新趋势：即利用开放、高性能的FPGA硬件，为硬核复古游戏玩家和收藏家提供最原汁原味且画质增强的游戏体验。其开源核心策略可能推动一个更活跃的社区开发生态，而亲民的价格和经典设计则直接瞄准了主流怀旧玩家市场。目前Analogue 3D处于售罄状态，为M64留下了明确的市场窗口。如果ModRetro能成功融资并如期交付产品，凭借其技术路线、价格策略和开放性优势，M64有望在高端复古游戏主机领域成为强有力的竞争者，甚至重塑该细分市场的格局。

history.title: Chinese SSD maker YMTC lists first commercial PCIe 5.0 SSD as worldwide shortage intensifies — Xtacking 4.0 NAND powers speeds of up to 10,500 MB/s
history.description: The newly listed PC550 SSD targets AI PCs and commercial systems and features PCIe 5.0 x4 connectivity, NVMe 2.0 support, and a four-channel design.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Chinese manufacturer Yangtze Memory Technologies Corp (YMTC) has just listed its first commercial PCIe 5.0 NVMe SSD. The PC550 SSD features a PCIe 5.0 x4 interface along with the NVMe 2.0 protocol, and is being offered in 512GB, 1TB, and 2TB capacities. The SSD features YMTC’s X4-9070 3D NAND chips based on Xtacking 4.0, along with a four-channel design, which is claimed to help in reducing power consumption and heat generation when compared to eight-channel.Go deeper with TH Premium: AI shortages (Image credit: Nvidia)AI data centers are swallowing the world's memory and storage supplyChip scarcity assaults auto industry amid the worsening Nexperia and DRAM crisisSamsung and SK hynix shorten memory contracts as pricing power shifts back to suppliersMemory makers are set to earn $551 billion from the AI boomThe YMTC PC550 SSD will be available in both M.2 2242 and M.2 2280 form factors and is primarily targeted at AI PCs and commercial client systems. According to the company, the drive can offer up to 10,500 MB/s sequential read and up to 10,000 MB/s sequential write on the 2TB variant. While that makes it considerably faster than some of the best PCIe 4.0 SSDs, it isn’t the fastest among PCIe 5.0 drives, as other manufacturers offer products capable of reaching speeds close to 15,000 MB/s.Back in late 2024, we spotted a PCIe 5.0 SSD based on YMTC’s NAND delivering much higher speeds. The Zhitai TiPro9000, which used YMTC’s 5th-generation 3D NAND with the Xtacking 4.0 architecture, was tested with the Silicon Motion SM2508 controller and achieved sequential read speeds of 14,527 MB/s and write speeds of roughly 13,800 MB/s. You may like Micron announces 3610 SSD, the industry-first PCIe 5.0 QLC SSD available to OEMs First PCIe 6.0 SSD enters mass production with 28GB/s speeds, 5.5 million IOPS, and liquid cooling Phison's new SSD controller sips a mere 2.3W and runs at 14.7 GB/s, addressing PCIe 5.0's power concerns Coming back to the PC550, the 512GB base model is listed to offer up to 880K random read IOPS and 1,100K random write IOPS, along with a durability rating of 300TBW. Both the 1TB and 2TB models offer increased performance of 1,300K random read and write IOPS with an endurance of 600 TBW and 1,200 TBW respectively. As for power consumption, the drive is claimed to consume less than 3mW at idle and under 6W during active workloads.The official product page of the YMTC PC550 SSD does not mention price or a way to purchase the drive, however, consumers interested in the product can drop an inquiry. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
history.author: Kunal Khullar
history.titleZh: 长江存储推出全球首款商用PCIe 5.0 SSD，Xtacking 4.0闪存实现10500 MB/s极速——全球供应紧缺加剧之际
history.descriptionZh:
中国存储制造商长江存储技术公司近日正式发布了其首款商用PCIe 5.0 NVMe固态硬盘——PC550。该产品标志着长江存储在高性能消费级存储领域迈出了重要一步，也是国内产业链在PCIe 5.0这一前沿接口标准上的关键进展。

**背景与产品定位**
PC550 SSD提供了512GB、1TB和2TB三种容量选项，采用M.2 2242和M.2 2280两种规格。其发布正值AI PC与高性能商用客户端系统需求崛起之际，产品明确瞄准了这一市场，旨在为AI计算、内容创作和专业应用提供高速存储支持。

**核心技术原理与创新点**
该固态硬盘的核心技术亮点主要体现在两方面：
1.  **Xtacking 4.0架构与X4-9070 3D NAND闪存**：PC550采用了长江存储自研的X4-9070 3D NAND芯片，基于最新的Xtacking 4.0架构。该架构通过将存储单元阵列和外围电路分别在两片晶圆上独立制造并垂直堆叠互连，提升了存储密度和I/O速度，同时优化了生产周期。
2.  **四通道设计**：与市场上许多高性能PCIe 5.0 SSD采用的八通道设计不同，PC550选择了四通道设计。长江存储声称，这一设计有助于在保持高性能的同时，有效降低功耗和减少发热，从而改善能效比，对于空间紧凑、散热要求高的设备（如轻薄AI PC）更具实际意义。

**性能参数与对比分析**
根据官方数据，PC550 2TB型号的顺序读取和写入速度最高分别可达10,500 MB/s和10,000 MB/s。这一性能使其显著超越了市面上顶级的PCIe 4.0 SSD，但与部分竞品的PCIe 5.0旗舰型号（速度可达约15,000 MB/s）相比，仍有一定差距。新闻中提及，早在2024年底，已有采用长江存储第五代3D NAND（Xtacking 4.0）和慧荣SM2508主控的固态硬盘（如致态TiPro9000）在测试中实现了超过14,500 MB/s的顺序读取速度，表明长江存储闪存在更高性能配置下具备潜力。

在随机性能方面，512GB型号的随机读写IOPS分别为88万和110万，而1TB和2TB型号则均提升至130万/130万 IOPS。耐用性（TBW）方面，三个容量依次为300TB、600TB和1200TB。功耗控制是PC550强调的另一个优势，其空闲功耗宣称低于3mW，活跃工作负载下的功耗也控制在6W以下。

**技术影响与应用场景**
长江存储PC550的推出，为AI PC和高端商用笔记本市场提供了一个新的高性能存储选择。其平衡性能与功耗的设计思路，特别适合对续航、散热和性能有综合要求的移动计算平台。此外，作为中国核心存储厂商在PCIe 5.0领域的重要产品，PC550的上市也增强了存储供应链的多样性，特别是在当前AI数据中心需求激增、全球存储供应面临压力的背景下。

目前，该产品的官方页面尚未公布具体售价和购买方式，消费者需通过询价渠道获取进一步信息。

history.title: Seagate FireCuda X1070 SSD spotted at retailers — listed at $829.99 before any official announcement
history.description: Seagate's unannounced FireCuda X1070 NVMe SSD appeared on Amazon and Best Buy listings this week before its product page went offline.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Seagate's unannounced FireCuda X1070 NVMe SSD appeared on Amazon and Best Buy listings this week — with a full spec sheet from Best Buy and an indicated price of $829.99 — before its product page went offline, suggesting an announcement could be imminent. The drive is a PCIe Gen4x4 M.2 2280 model coming in 1TB, 2TB, and 4TB capacities, and marks Seagate's first new consumer SSD in more than a year. (Image credit: Future)Sequential read speed is rated at 7,200 MB/s across all three capacities, and sequential write reaches 6,000 MB/s on the 1TB model and 6,500 MB/s on the 2TB and 4TB variants. Random performance is listed at up to 900,000 IOPS read and 1,000,000 IOPS write, depending on capacity. Seagate is bundling a 5-year warranty and three years of its Rescue Data Recovery Services across the lineup.The X1070 trails on several key specs compared to the current FireCuda 530R. Sequential read and write speeds are lower across all three capacities, and the 530R's 4TB model is rated for 5,100 TBW versus the X1070's 2,400 TBW. You may like First PCIe 6.0 SSD enters mass production with 28GB/s speeds, 5.5 million IOPS, and liquid cooling Micro Center lists 8TB WD_Black SSD at $2,419 MSRP, real price tag up 50% since October Micron announces 3610 SSD, the industry-first PCIe 5.0 QLC SSD available to OEMs Swipe to scroll horizontallyRow 0 - Cell 0 X1070 1TBX1070 2TBX1070 4TB530R 1TB530R 4TBInterfacePCIe 4.0 x4PCIe 4.0 x4PCIe 4.0 x4PCIe 4.0 x4PCIe 4.0 x4Seq. Read (MB/s)7,2007,2007,2007,4007,400Seq. Write (MB/s)6,0006,5006,5007,0006,900Rand. Read (IOPS)850,000900,000900,000——Rand. Write (IOPS)900,0001,000,000900,000——Durability Rating (TBW)6001,2002,4001,2755,100NANDTBCTBCTBC3D TLC3D TLCThat difference may come down to NAND type. Amazon's listing described the X1070 as using "3D QLC NAND," though the performance figures sit closer to what TLC-based drives typically deliver. QLC SSDs tend to drop off more sharply under sustained sequential writes once the SLC write cache is exhausted, which would also account for the lower TBW ratings. Neither the controller nor the NAND has been confirmed by Seagate, so both remain unknown until an official announcement.The drive is certified for the ROG Xbox Ally, and ROG Xbox Ally X handhelds, and the retail box includes a one-month Xbox Game Pass Ultimate trial and a two-month Adobe Creative Cloud Pro subscription per the Best Buy spec sheet.The decision to go with PCIe Gen4 rather than Gen5 is notable given that the FireCuda 540 uses a Gen5 interface. PCIe 5.0 SSDs remain expensive and run hot, so Gen4 makes sense given its apparent target applications, even if the X1070 appears to slot below the 530R on paper rather than above it. Seagate released no new consumer storage products in 2025, making the X1070 its first release in the client SSD market in over a year.At this stage, no official information or launch date has been announced, and whether that $829 price tag is accurate remains unknown.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
history.author: Luke James
history.titleZh: 希捷FireCuda X1070 SSD现身零售渠道——未官宣先曝光，标价829.99美元
history.descriptionZh:
希捷尚未正式发布的FireCuda X1070 NVMe固态硬盘，其产品页面和规格于本周意外出现在亚马逊和百思买等零售平台，随后被撤下，这表明其官方发布可能已临近。泄露信息显示，这款固态硬盘定价为829.99美元，是希捷一年多来首次推出的新款消费级SSD。

该硬盘采用PCIe Gen4 x4接口和M.2 2280外形规格，提供1TB、2TB和4TB三种容量。其连续读取速度在三种容量下均为7,200 MB/s，而连续写入速度在1TB型号上为6,000 MB/s，在2TB和4TB型号上则达到6,500 MB/s。随机性能方面，最高可达900,000 IOPS读取和1,000,000 IOPS写入（具体数值依容量而定）。全系列产品均附带5年质保和3年的Rescue数据恢复服务。

与当前产品线中的FireCuda 530R相比，X1070在多个关键规格上有所“落后”。其连续读写速度在所有容量上都低于530R。尤其在耐用性指标（TBW，总写入字节数）上，差异显著：530R的4TB型号额定为5,100 TBW，而X1070的4TB型号仅为2,400 TBW。这种差异很可能源于闪存类型的不同。亚马逊的列表描述X1070使用的是“3D QLC NAND”，尽管其性能数据更接近通常基于TLC的硬盘。QLC固态硬盘的特性是，一旦SLC写入缓存耗尽，其在持续顺序写入下的性能会显著下降，这也解释了其较低的TBW评级。目前，希捷尚未正式确认其控制器和闪存的具体型号。

值得注意的是，X1070选择了PCIe Gen4接口，而非其兄弟型号FireCuda 540所采用的Gen5接口。考虑到目前PCIe 5.0 SSD价格仍然昂贵且发热量较大，Gen4接口对于其目标应用场景（包括经过认证的ROG Ally和Ally X游戏掌机）来说是更合理的选择。从纸面规格看，X1070似乎并非用于取代或定位高于530R，而是可能面向不同的细分市场。

此外，根据百思买的规格表，其零售包装将包含一个月的Xbox Game Pass Ultimate试用版和两个月的Adobe Creative Cloud Pro订阅服务。

目前，希捷尚未发布任何官方信息或发布日期，829.99美元的价格标签是否准确也尚不确定。此次X1070的泄露，标志着希捷在2025年未推出任何新消费级存储产品后，重新回归客户端SSD市场。
